failedAssertions.reason: MediaPipe AI model failed to load in headless browser environment
MediaPipe model loading failure from CDN (net::ERR_FAILED) - bounding boxes not rendered
MediaPipe model failed to load - confidence threshold slider not accessible until isLoaded=true
MediaPipe AI model loading timeout (>30s) and browser automation instability

frictions.description: MediaPipe AI model loading takes significantly longer than expected in headless browser environment (>30s vs expected 3-5s)
MediaPipe ObjectDetector WASM model fails to initialize from CDN with net::ERR_FAILED errors
ConfidenceThresholdSlider only renders when isLoaded=true, which requires successful MediaPipe model initialization
Browser automation session became unstable during VAL-CROSS-007 testing

blockers.description: MediaPipe object detection model (efficientdet_lite0) fails to load from Google Cloud Storage CDN. The model initialization requires fetching WASM files from cdn.jsdelivr.net and the model file from storage.googleapis.com. Extended wait times (30+ seconds) did not result in successful loading.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 30+ seconds for model load, attempted page reloads, network interception to mock model response, JavaScript injection to bypass model loading, localStorage flags for mock mode, overlay-test.html test harness. All unsuccessful.
blockers.recommendation: Add a mock detection mode to the app that can be enabled via localStorage or query parameter for automated testing. This would bypass the MediaPipe model and render predefined bounding boxes.

summary: User testing for dashboard milestone: 6 assertions passed, 4 failed. Passed: Detail modal basic functionality (VAL-DM-001 through VAL-DM-005) and policy change updates (VAL-DM-007). Failed: Camera-specific assertions (VAL-DM-006, VAL-OVERLAY-010, VAL-OVERLAY-014, VAL-CROSS-007) all blocked by MediaPipe AI model loading failure in headless browser environment. The DetailModal component works correctly for dashboard-triggered modals; camera-triggered modals cannot be tested without a mock detection system.
